title: Crumbly Sweet Ukrainian Flour Cookies with Olives and Pickles
description: These crumbly Ukrainian flour cookies blend sweet buttered dough with briny olives and pickle bits for a midnight craving treat.

ingredients.name: dried black olives, pitted and chopped

instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a bowl, whisk flour, baking powder, and salt together and set aside.
In another larger bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy; add honey and mix until combined.
Beat in the egg and vanilla extract until smooth.
Gradually fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture, mixing just until combined.
Gently stir in chopped olives, diced pickles, and lemon zest; the dough will be slightly sticky.
Drop spoonfuls of dough onto the prepared sheet, spacing them 5 cm apart.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden.
Let the cookies cool on the sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
